all.en: From: Vivian Ho, Administration Department, Headquarters
all.zh: 寄件人：總部行政部 Vivian Ho

all.en: To: Premier Limousine Services, Corporate Accounts Team
all.zh: 收件人：Premier Limousine 接送公司企業客戶團隊

all.en: Subject: Confirmation Request — Airport Transfers for 10 Overseas Guests
all.zh: 主旨：確認申請 — 10 位海外賓客之機場接送

all.en: Dear Mr. Wells, this email confirms the transfer booking discussed yesterday.
all.zh: Wells 先生您好，此信旨在確認昨日所討論之接送預約。

all.en: Our company will host the annual partner forum next Wednesday.
all.zh: 本公司將於下週三舉辦年度合作夥伴論壇。

all.en: Ten executives from five countries will require ground transportation.
all.zh: 來自五國之十位高階主管將需要地面交通服務。

all.en: All guests are arriving at Taoyuan International Airport, Terminal 2.
all.zh: 所有賓客將抵達桃園國際機場第二航廈。

all.en: Guest list and flight details are attached as Appendix A.
all.zh: 賓客名單與航班資訊請見附件 A。

all.en: Please confirm vehicle assignments and driver contact details by tomorrow.
all.zh: 請於明日前確認車輛分派與司機聯絡資料。

all.en: Guest one: Mr. Hiroshi Tanaka, JL801, arriving 09:30 from Tokyo.
all.zh: 賓客一：田中博先生，JL801 航班，09:30 自東京抵達。

all.en: Guest two: Ms. Soo-jin Park, KE195, arriving 10:15 from Seoul.
all.zh: 賓客二：朴秀珍女士，KE195 航班，10:15 自首爾抵達。

all.en: Guest three: Mr. Linh Nguyen, VN570, arriving 11:00 from Hanoi.
all.zh: 賓客三：阮玲先生，VN570 航班，11:00 自河內抵達。

all.en: Guest four: Dr. Anya Petrova, SU271, arriving 12:45 from Moscow.
all.zh: 賓客四：Anya Petrova 博士，SU271 航班，12:45 自莫斯科抵達。

all.en: Guest five: Mr. David Cohen, EL691, arriving 14:20 from Tel Aviv.
all.zh: 賓客五：David Cohen 先生，EL691 航班，14:20 自特拉維夫抵達。

all.en: Guest six: Ms. Marie Dubois, AF188, arriving 14:55 from Paris.
all.zh: 賓客六：Marie Dubois 女士，AF188 航班，14:55 自巴黎抵達。

all.en: Guest seven: Mr. Carlos Mendez, LA754, arriving 16:00 from Sao Paulo.
all.zh: 賓客七：Carlos Mendez 先生，LA754 航班，16:00 自聖保羅抵達。

all.en: Guest eight: Ms. Fatima Al-Sabah, EK366, arriving 16:35 from Dubai.
all.zh: 賓客八：Fatima Al-Sabah 女士，EK366 航班，16:35 自杜拜抵達。

all.en: Guest nine: Mr. Henrik Larsson, SK983, arriving 17:50 from Stockholm.
all.zh: 賓客九：Henrik Larsson 先生，SK983 航班，17:50 自斯德哥爾摩抵達。

all.en: Guest ten: Ms. Aisha Okafor, ET619, arriving 18:25 from Lagos.
all.zh: 賓客十：Aisha Okafor 女士，ET619 航班，18:25 自拉哥斯抵達。

all.en: All transfers should terminate at the Mandarin Oriental Taipei.
all.zh: 所有接送之目的地皆為台北文華東方酒店。

all.en: Please provide ten executive sedans rather than shared vans.
all.zh: 請提供十輛行政房車，而非共乘廂型車。

all.en: Each vehicle should carry a placard with the guest's full name.
all.zh: 每輛車應備有寫有賓客全名之接機牌。

all.en: Drivers must wait inside the arrivals hall, not curbside.
all.zh: 司機須於入境大廳內等候，請勿於路邊停留。

all.en: Bottled water and a welcome card should be placed in each vehicle.
all.zh: 車內須備瓶裝水及一張歡迎卡片。

all.en: Reply from Premier Limousine: Dear Ms. Ho, confirmation as requested follows.
all.zh: Premier Limousine 回覆：Ho 女士您好，依貴方所請確認如下。

all.en: Ten executive sedans, model Mercedes E-Class, have been allocated.
all.zh: 已派定十輛賓士 E-Class 行政房車。

all.en: Each vehicle is staffed with an English-speaking professional chauffeur.
all.zh: 每輛車皆配置會講英語之專業司機。

all.en: Driver assignments and contact numbers are listed in Appendix B.
all.zh: 司機分派與聯絡電話列於附件 B。

all.en: Tracking links will be sent to your team 30 minutes before each pickup.
all.zh: 各趟接機前 30 分鐘將寄送追蹤連結予貴方團隊。

all.en: Driver Lin will meet Mr. Tanaka holding placard PL-001.
all.zh: 司機林先生將持 PL-001 接機牌接田中先生。

all.en: Driver Wang will meet Ms. Park holding placard PL-002.
all.zh: 司機王先生將持 PL-002 接機牌接朴女士。

all.en: Drivers Chen, Hsu, and Lee will handle the afternoon arrivals.
all.zh: 司機陳、徐、李三位將負責下午抵達之賓客。

all.en: All drivers wear black suits with company identification cards visible.
all.zh: 所有司機皆穿著黑色西裝並佩戴公司識別證。

all.en: Estimated transit time to the hotel is 50 minutes off-peak.
all.zh: 非尖峰時段至飯店預估車程為 50 分鐘。

all.en: Peak hour transfers may extend up to 80 minutes total.
all.zh: 尖峰時段接送總時間可能延長至 80 分鐘。

all.en: Welcome amenities will be standard — bottled water and welcome card.
all.zh: 迎賓備品依標準配置 — 瓶裝水及歡迎卡。

all.en: Should you prefer customized welcome gifts, please advise by Friday.
all.zh: 如需客製化迎賓禮品，請於週五前告知。

all.en: Total package cost is NT$48,000 inclusive of taxes and gratuity.
all.zh: 整套方案總費用為新台幣 48,000 元，含稅與服務費。

all.en: Invoice will be issued after service completion as per agreement.
all.zh: 依協議將於服務完成後開立發票。

all.en: Payment terms remain net thirty days from invoice date.
all.zh: 付款條件維持發票日後三十日內付清。

all.en: In case of flight delay, drivers will wait up to two hours at no charge.
all.zh: 如遇班機延誤，司機免費等候上限為兩小時。

all.en: Beyond that, standard waiting fee of NT$600 per hour applies.
all.zh: 逾時則依每小時新台幣 600 元之標準等候費收取。

all.en: We will monitor all flight statuses through our dispatch center.
all.zh: 本公司將透過調度中心監控所有班機動態。

all.en: Vivian's follow-up: Thank you for the detailed confirmation.
all.zh: Vivian 後續回覆：感謝您詳實之確認。

all.en: Please add customized welcome gifts for the five most senior guests.
all.zh: 請為五位最高階賓客加備客製迎賓禮品。

all.en: Each gift should include a small tea set and a handwritten note.
all.zh: 每份禮品應含小型茶具一組與手寫卡片。

all.en: Notes should be in the guest's native language whenever possible.
all.zh: 卡片內容請儘可能以賓客母語撰寫。

all.en: Our marketing team will provide translated text by tomorrow afternoon.
all.zh: 本公司行銷團隊將於明日下午提供譯文。

all.en: Additional cost for the gift packages is approved up to NT$15,000.
all.zh: 禮品包另核准追加預算上限為新台幣 15,000 元。

all.en: Premier Limousine: Customized gifts noted and instructions acknowledged.
all.zh: Premier Limousine 回覆：客製禮品已記錄，指示亦已收悉。

all.en: We will coordinate gift placement with each driver before pickup.
all.zh: 本公司將於接機前協調各司機放置禮品。

all.en: A photo of each vehicle setup will be sent for your records.
all.zh: 每輛車之布置照片將寄送供貴方建檔。

all.en: Final dispatch briefing will occur Tuesday at 17:00 as standard.
all.zh: 最終調度說明會將依例於週二 17:00 進行。

all.en: All operational details are now confirmed and locked into our system.
all.zh: 所有作業細節已確認並寫入本公司系統。

all.en: Confirmation reference number for your records is BK-2026-0419-VIP.
all.zh: 供貴方建檔之確認編號為 BK-2026-0419-VIP。
